action_steps.detail: QueryExecutor.java: RelationType enum (ADJ_MODIFIER, ADJ_PREDICATE, SUBJECT_OF, OBJECT_OF) is dead migration artifact - GrammarConfigLoader uses String relationType instead. CQLParser.java: dead lemma-substitution code path never reached. Delete both.

api-coherence.name: api-coherence
api-coherence.description: Fix API coherence: BCQL error returns HTTP 200 (16250503); extract duplicate relation switch (90d6143d).

action_steps.title: In handleBcqlQueryPost() catch block (line ~1058), replace sendJsonResponse(exchange, errorResponse) with sendError(exchange, 400, e.getMessage()) [refs: 16250503, 90d6143d]
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.java handleBcqlQueryPost(): catch block at line ~1058 calls sendJsonResponse(exchange, errorResponse) with HTTP 200. Replace with sendError(exchange, 400, e.getMessage()).

action_steps.title: Add Access-Control-Allow-Origin:* header to sendError() in HttpApiUtils.java [refs: 0fde8aad]
action_steps.detail: HttpApiUtils.java sendError() method: missing exchange.getResponseHeaders().set('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*') before sendResponseHeaders(). Add it.

action_steps.title: Extract normalizeRelationId(String) helper method from duplicate switch in handleSemanticFieldExplore and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti [refs: 1eabe767, duplicate_relation_alias_mapping]
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.java: identical switch mapping 'adj_predicate'->'adj-predicate' etc. exists in both handleSemanticFieldExplore and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti. Extract to private normalizeRelationId(String) method.

action_steps.title: Standardize edge field naming: use logDice consistently across all semantic-field endpoint responses [refs: 9242e195]
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.java: semantic-field endpoints return edge.weight in one place and edge.logDice in another. Standardize all three handlers to use logDice key.

action_steps.title: Fix or document concordance highlighted positions (related files: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java) [refs: 731aab0f, 03112ebc]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: concordance results lack highlighted match positions. Review ConcordanceResult construction to ensure matchStart/matchEnd are always populated.

abstraction-cleanup.name: abstraction-cleanup
abstraction-cleanup.description: Remove hollow abstractions: dead Token match methods (7de930fa) and hollow PosTagger interface (5f270cc8).

action_steps.title: Delete matchesTag(), matchesLemma(), matchesWord(), matchesPosGroup() from Token.java — these methods duplicate AbstractPatternPredicate and are tested but not called in production [refs: 7de930fa, 3ce9ba20]
action_steps.detail: Token.java: matchesTag(), matchesLemma(), matchesWord(), matchesPosGroup() methods duplicate AbstractPatternPredicate logic. Only used in tests (TokenPatternMatchTest.java), never in production code path. Delete all four methods.

action_steps.title: Remove PosTagger interface; update Main.java and BlackLabConllUIndexer to use SimpleTagger directly — the interface adds indirection with no polymorphism benefit [refs: 5f270cc8, 66a1ad26]
action_steps.detail: PosTagger interface: only one implementation (SimpleTagger). Main.java and BlackLabConllUIndexer reference SimpleTagger directly already. Remove interface, keep SimpleTagger.

action_steps.title: Remove NotPredicate.negate() override if it duplicates the AbstractPatternPredicate default [refs: 66a1ad26]
action_steps.detail: NotPredicate.java: check if negate() override adds behavior beyond AbstractPatternPredicate default. If identical, remove the override.

action_steps.title: Evaluate RelationType enum in QueryExecutor: move to a standalone type or delete if unused [refs: ca604134, 81698ff1]
action_steps.detail: QueryExecutor.java: RelationType enum leaks CQL patterns into the query interface. Remove enum entirely or move to a standalone domain type if needed by GrammarConfigLoader.

convention-fixes.name: convention-fixes
convention-fixes.description: Fix convention issues: replace System.out with logger in BlackLabConllUIndexer, convert RelationsValidationTest to JUnit, fix test naming convention (Test prefix), remove debug prefix from logger.debug() calls, make BlackLabSnippetParser public, standardize wildcard imports

action_steps.title: Replace System.out.println calls with SLF4J logger (add logger field) in BlackLabConllUIndexer.java [refs: 8adb12bf]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabConllUIndexer.java: replace System.out.println/System.err.println calls with logger (add 'private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...)' field).

action_steps.title: Convert RelationsValidationTest to JUnit 5: replace public static void main() with @Test methods, add proper @BeforeEach setup [refs: 4fcd8622, bb752027]
action_steps.detail: RelationsValidationTest.java: public static void main() method is not discovered by JUnit Surefire. Rewrite as class with @Test methods and proper assertions.

action_steps.title: Remove 'DEBUG: ' prefix from logger.debug() calls in PatternSubstitution.java and WordSketchApiServer.java (logger level already communicates this) [refs: 6e60cbde]
action_steps.detail: PatternSubstitution.java and WordSketchApiServer.java: logger.debug() calls have 'DEBUG: ' prefix (e.g. 'DEBUG BCQL: {}'). Remove prefix - logger level suffix is redundant.

action_steps.title: Make BlackLabSnippetParser class declaration public (currently package-private) [refs: 502a1f74]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser.java: class is declared package-private (no public modifier). Should be public since it is used from WordSketchApiServer in same package but should be accessible.

action_steps.title: Standardize imports: remove unused or mixed wildcard imports across codebase [refs: e250c00a]
action_steps.detail: Some files use wildcard imports (import java.util.*) while others use explicit imports. Standardize to explicit imports throughout.

migration-cleanup.name: migration-cleanup
migration-cleanup.description: Clean up incomplete migration artifacts: .bak files, phantom class references in CLAUDE.md, stale javadoc in QueryResults, orphaned SketchGrammarParser and CQL grammar classes, dead predicate subsystem

action_steps.title: Delete all .bak files from src/ tree: git rm $(find src/ -name '*.bak') [refs: ad5d27ba, c42309c3]
action_steps.detail: Run: git rm $(find src/ -name '*.bak') to remove all .bak files committed in src/ tree. These are development artifacts, not source code.

action_steps.title: Rewrite CLAUDE.md code-structure section: replace all phantom class names with the actual current file tree [refs: 20539e94, 66b2433f]
action_steps.detail: CLAUDE.md code-structure section lists classes like HybridLuceneIndexer, CollocationsBuilderV2, HybridIndex, HybridQueryExecutor, WordSketchQueryExecutor, SnowballCollocations, ConllUProcessor, CQLToLuceneCompiler, LuceneIndexer that were deleted. Replace section with actual current class tree.

action_steps.title: Fix stale javadoc in QueryResults.java (references HybridIndex patterns) [refs: 33a1cb4d]
action_steps.detail: QueryResults.java javadoc references HybridIndex patterns that were deleted. Update to describe the actual BlackLab-based result structure.

action_steps.title: Delete SketchGrammarParser.java — never called in production, only parses .wsdef.m4 format that GrammarConfigLoader already handles as JSON [refs: 6f5d6612, 0d3e3c0c]
action_steps.detail: SketchGrammarParser.java parses .wsdef.m4 grammar format but is never called - GrammarConfigLoader handles JSON config instead. Delete file.

action_steps.title: Evaluate dead predicate subsystem (CQLVerifier, Token, LemmaPredicate etc.) — if only used in tests, move to test scope or delete [refs: 034ac077, b6734c82]
action_steps.detail: CQLVerifier.java and the predicate subsystem (Token, LemmaPredicate, PosGroupPredicate, WordPredicate, TagPredicate, AbstractPatternPredicate, NotPredicate) exist in query package but are unused in BlackLabQueryExecutor production path. Move to test scope or delete.

design-fixes.name: design-fixes
design-fixes.description: Fix design defects: double-close bug, stream-to-logger bug, duplicate logDice pipeline (4x in BlackLabQueryExecutor), duplicate derivePosition methods, double query execution, REPITITION typo, duplicate split methods, dual relation lookup API, inconsistent InvalidQuery handling

action_steps.title: Fix SemanticFieldExplorer double-close: add ownsExecutor boolean field, set true in constructor(indexPath) and false in constructor(executor); call close() only when ownsExecutor [refs: be452aa8]
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.java: add 'private final boolean ownsExecutor' field. In constructor(String indexPath) set ownsExecutor=true. In constructor(QueryExecutor executor) set ownsExecutor=false. In close() guard: if (ownsExecutor) executor.close().

action_steps.title: Fix stream-to-logger bug in SemanticFieldExplorer: replace logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.stream()) with logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.subList(0, Math.min(5, adjectives.size()))) [refs: 960a3009]
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.java: logger.info('Top 5: {}', adjectives.stream()) logs a Stream object reference, not contents. Replace stream() with adjectives.subList(0, Math.min(5, adjectives.size())).

action_steps.title: Fix REPITITION typo to REPETITION in CQLParser.java constant definition [refs: 59af47ae]
action_steps.detail: CQLParser.java: constant REPITITION is a typo. Rename to REPETITION throughout the file.

action_steps.title: Extract buildAndRankCollocates() helper in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java to eliminate 4x duplicate logDice pipeline [refs: eb5ee714]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: 4 methods each repeat the pattern of iterating collocate hits, calling logDice, collecting top-N results. Extract private buildAndRankCollocates(List<Hit>, String headLemma, int topN) helper.

action_steps.title: Fix double query execution in executeDependencyPattern(): remove the extra blackLabIndex.find(query) call, keep only the search().find() variant [refs: d549e262]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java executeDependencyPattern(): calls blackLabIndex.find(query) then immediately calls blackLabIndex.search().find(query) with same query - two database hits. Remove the first find() call.

action_steps.title: Extract deriveTokenPosition(RelationConfig, boolean) in GrammarConfigLoader.java to eliminate deriveHeadPositionFromPattern/deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern duplication [refs: c9c31d2b]
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java: deriveHeadPositionFromPattern() and deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern() are ~identical. Extract deriveTokenPosition(RelationConfig rel, boolean isHead) and call it from both.

action_steps.title: Merge splitByOrOutsideQuotes and splitByAnd in CQLParser.java into a single splitByDelimiterOutsideQuotes(String, char) method [refs: 75ad285b]
action_steps.detail: CQLParser.java: splitByOrOutsideQuotes(String) and splitByAnd(String) duplicate the same quote-aware split logic with different delimiters. Merge into splitByDelimiterOutsideQuotes(String input, char delimiter).

action_steps.title: Remove getRelationById() nullable method from GrammarConfigLoader.java, standardize on getRelation() returning Optional<RelationConfig> [refs: d1bab8d0]
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java: has both getRelation(String id) returning Optional<RelationConfig> and getRelationById(String id) returning nullable RelationConfig. Remove getRelationById(), update all callers to use getRelation().

action_steps.title: Fix inconsistent InvalidQuery handling: in findCollocations(), propagate or wrap InvalidQuery instead of swallowing it silently [refs: 1b711f2d]
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor.java findCollocations(): catches InvalidQuery and returns empty result silently. All other methods propagate or wrap it. Add throws clause or wrap in IOException.

test-fixes.name: test-fixes
test-fixes.description: Fix test infrastructure: RelationsValidationTest uses main() not @Test; LongIntHashMapTest is in wrong package; integration tests use hardcoded paths; CQL verifier has shallow assertions; dummy test has no assertions

action_steps.title: Convert RelationsValidationTest.main() to JUnit 5 @Test methods (coordinated with convention-fixes) [refs: bb752027, 4fcd8622]
action_steps.detail: In the 4 live-index test classes (BlackLabQueryExecutorTest, BlackLabBcqlConcordanceTest, BlackLabDummyTest, DependencySketchTest), replace hardcoded D: path fallback with @EnabledIfSystemProperty(named='conceptSketch.testIndex', matches='.+') annotation to make skipping explicit.

action_steps.title: Move LongIntHashMapTest.java from src/test/java/.../query/ to src/test/java/.../utils/ [refs: 3d4dd6de]
action_steps.detail: In SemanticFieldExplorerTest, change StubExecutor.executeDependencyPattern from 'throw new UnsupportedOperationException()' to 'return Collections.emptyList()'. Add Collections import if needed.

action_steps.title: In integration tests, use Assumptions.assumeTrue(Files.exists(indexPath)) for hardcoded-path tests [refs: f2b41692]
action_steps.detail: Integration tests with hardcoded paths like /d/corpus_74m/ will always fail on CI. Wrap with Assumptions.assumeTrue(Files.exists(Paths.get(hardcodedPath))) to skip gracefully.

action_steps.title: Fix dummy test with no assertions: add real assertions or delete [refs: 6c37555b]
action_steps.detail: Find the dummy test with no assertions (likely a test class with empty @Test methods or @Test methods that only call void methods without checking return values). Add meaningful assertions.

action_steps.title: In 4 live-index test classes replace hardcoded D: Windows fallback with @EnabledIfSystemProperty(named='conceptSketch.testIndex', matches='.+') annotation
action_steps.detail: Replace hardcoded D: path fallback with @EnabledIfSystemProperty(named='conceptSketch.testIndex', matches='.+') in BlackLabQueryExecutorTest, BlackLabBcqlConcordanceTest, BlackLabDummyTest, DependencySketchTest

action_steps.title: In SemanticFieldExplorerTest.StubExecutor replace UnsupportedOperationException in executeDependencyPattern with stub returning empty list
action_steps.detail: In SemanticFieldExplorerTest.StubExecutor change executeDependencyPattern to return Collections.emptyList() instead of throwing UnsupportedOperationException

package-org.name: package-org
package-org.description: Structural / documentation issues: utils catch-all package, query package blob (too many classes), phantom /api/grammar/active endpoint, README startup commands incomplete, sketch query params undocumented, GrammarConfigLoader god constructor, oversized executeBcqlQuery, god class API server

action_steps.title: Add README section with complete startup commands for API server, web UI, and corpus indexing [refs: 74787ee2, 74a31a26]
action_steps.detail: README.md startup section: add three-terminal deployment commands (API server, static web server, browser URL). Include the -Xmx flag for large indexes.

action_steps.title: Fix or remove /api/grammar/active endpoint if it serves no production purpose [refs: 92337fef]
action_steps.detail: /api/grammar/active endpoint in WordSketchApiServer: verify if it is meant to be operational. If not, either implement it or remove the route registration and logger line.

action_steps.title: Move predicate/Token classes to query.predicate subpackage if feasible; document utils package scope [refs: d9433671, 41a37fcc]
action_steps.detail: query package contains 20+ classes mixing production query code with test predicates and Token. Move predicate/Token hierarchy to query.predicate subpackage. Document utils package as general-purpose utilities.

bugs-first.name: bugs-first
bugs-first.description: Fix genuine correctness bugs: multi-seed pattern substitution missing, SimpleTagger 'am' tagged wrong, remaining parseInt sites

action_steps.title: Fix multi-seed pattern substitution bug
action_steps.detail: In handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (WordSketchApiServer.java ~line 651), replace 'relationConfig.get().pattern()' with 'relationConfig.get().getFullPattern(seed)' inside the seed loop. This fixes 1758e9d6 and f64a0eb4 — both describe the same bug where all seeds get the same wrong results.

action_steps.title: Fix SimpleTagger 'am' tagged as VBD
action_steps.detail: SimpleTagger.determineVerbForm line ~355: change 'if (word.equals("am")) return "VBD"' to 'if (word.equals("am")) return "VBP"'. Also note 'am' is not in AUX_VERBS so determineVerbForm is never reached for it — check VERB_FORMS map handles 'am' correctly.

action_steps.title: Complete input validation for remaining parseInt/parseDouble sites
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer.java lines 511-514 (handleSemanticFieldExplore: top, min_shared, min_logdice) and 647-649 (handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti: top, min_logdice) still have bare parseInt/parseDouble. Wrap each in try-catch or use the HttpApiUtils helper introduced in the prior cluster fix.

action_steps.title: Fix consistency: align min_logdice defaults and document multi-seed semantic corrections
action_steps.detail: After fixing 1758e9d6, verify the multi-seed handler correctly profiles each seed with a per-seed pattern. Also document in code comments why getFullPattern(seed) is needed. Update SemanticFieldExplorerTest to add a test covering the multi-seed pattern substitution path.

quick-wins.name: quick-wins
quick-wins.description: Trivial one-liner fixes: remove unused variable, add @Override, remove dead code, fix pom.xml artifact, remove trivial Javadoc

action_steps.title: One-liner trivial fixes across multiple files
action_steps.detail: b875d286: Remove 3 INFO-level entry logs in handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (lines 605,607,611). 23a92d60: Remove unused 'boolean raw' variable in handleBcqlQueryPost (line 976). 68952757: Add @Override to BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern. e45cd021: Remove dead denominator<=0 check in LogDiceCalculator (lines 27-29). cee88873: Remove unused lucene.version property from pom.xml. a58ece02: Fix pom.xml fastjson artifactId from 'fastjson' to 'fastjson2'. 31abc1a0: Remove trivial one-line Javadoc on LogDiceCalculator long overload. 08940874: Remove/collapse trivial Javadoc stubs in BlackLabSnippetParser that just restate method names. 4afb5e48: Inline extractXposPattern/extractPosPattern one-liner pass-throughs in GrammarConfigLoader. 69170286: Change explorationEnabled from Boolean to boolean primitive in RelationConfig record.

action_steps.title: Fix pom.xml dependencies and remove dead properties
action_steps.detail: a58ece02: Change <artifactId>fastjson</artifactId> to <artifactId>fastjson2</artifactId> in pom.xml. cee88873: Remove unused <lucene.version>8.11.1</lucene.version> property.

error-handling.name: error-handling
error-handling.description: Fix resource leaks and silent exception swallowing: try-with-resources for SEF, unify exception types in GrammarConfigLoader

action_steps.title: Wrap SemanticFieldExplorer in try-with-resources at all 3 handler sites
action_steps.detail: 849a08dc/fb1f477c: In WordSketchApiServer.java, replace manual new SEF()/explorer.close() at lines 516/527, 748/750, 826/828 with try(SemanticFieldExplorer explorer = new SemanticFieldExplorer(this.executor)){...} blocks. Eliminates resource leak on exception.

action_steps.title: Fix silent exception handling in deleteRecursively and promote getTotalFrequency logging
action_steps.detail: c4c81417: Add logger.warn in deleteRecursively catch block in Main.java. fd991d3a: In BlackLabQueryExecutor.getTotalFrequency, the warn log already exists — promote note in Javadoc that 0 return can corrupt logDice.

action_steps.title: Unify GrammarConfigLoader exception types
action_steps.detail: a0f5adfa: GrammarConfigLoader constructor throws IOException + IllegalArgumentException for config errors. Wrap validation failures as IOException with descriptive messages, or introduce ConfigurationException. Fix createDefaultEnglish() which silently swallows IllegalArgumentException and returns null.

stubs-cleanup.name: stubs-cleanup
stubs-cleanup.description: Resolve getCorpusSize stub: either implement using BlackLab API or remove and add to interface as not-implemented

action_steps.title: Resolve getCorpusSize stub and add to QueryExecutor interface
action_steps.detail: 0e1a2550/19f1f331/df7c88da: BlackLabQueryExecutor.getCorpusSize() returns hardcoded 0L and is not on QueryExecutor interface. Option A: implement using BlackLab API (blackLabIndex stats). Option B: add as default method returning -1L on QueryExecutor with clear Javadoc. Remove or fix the method name to not mislead callers. Also check if it is called anywhere — if not, remove it entirely.

action_steps.title: Add getCorpusSize to QueryExecutor interface with clear contract Javadoc
action_steps.detail: Either: (A) implement in BlackLabQueryExecutor using BlackLab's corpus statistics API, or (B) add to QueryExecutor interface as a default returning -1L with Javadoc 'returns total token count or -1 if not implemented'. Remove the orphaned public method from BlackLabQueryExecutor that isn't on the interface.

action_steps.title: Verify no callers rely on getCorpusSize returning 0 for functional logic
action_steps.detail: Search all usages of getCorpusSize() across the codebase. If it is truly unused, removing it is simpler and cleaner than implementing it. If any caller relies on it, it must be properly implemented.

god-class-extraction.name: god-class-extraction
god-class-extraction.description: Break WordSketchApiServer monolith: extract duplicate handlers, try-with-resources, extract response builder helper

action_steps.title: Extract duplicate handleRelationQuery/handleDependencyRelationQuery into shared private helper
action_steps.detail: e78fe5ee/25a90bd1: Extract private buildCollocationResponse(exchange, lemma, RelationType relationType) helper and private buildRelationsJson(RelationType) helper to eliminate copy-paste 36-line blocks in handleRelationQuery/handleDependencyRelationQuery and identical loop bodies in /api/relations and /api/relations/dep lambdas.

action_steps.title: Extract toExplorationResponseMap helper and reduce handleSemanticFieldExplore
action_steps.detail: a798cc0e: Extract private Map<String,Object> toExplorationResponseMap(ExplorationResult result, ...) helper from handleSemanticFieldExplore to separate JSON serialisation (lines 529-597) from parameter parsing and orchestration. Reduces 114-line method to ~40 lines.

action_steps.title: Extract shared CQL bracket-walker utility, consolidate PatternSubstitution with GrammarConfigLoader
action_steps.detail: 087f4daa/75ad285b: Both PatternSubstitution.java and GrammarConfigLoader.java independently implement the []-bracket-walking token-split loop. Extract a shared PatternTokenizer or CqlTokenizer utility with a splitTokens(String pattern) method. Both callers delegate to it. This unifies the 3 copy-paste bracket-walking loops in GrammarConfigLoader and the 1 in PatternSubstitution.

action_steps.title: Rename SEF inner classes from adjective to collocate, fix naming inconsistencies
action_steps.detail: beffa977: Rename ExplorationResult.seedAdjectives->seedCollocates, CoreAdjective->CoreCollocate, sharedAdjectives->sharedCollocates. 0f0ee4f3: Consider renaming SemanticFieldExplorer to SemanticFieldAnalyzer/SemanticFieldService. 1f248689: Standardize DTO style — either convert SEF inner classes to private+getter pattern matching QueryResults, or document public-final as intentional. dea22e2a: Introduce ExploreOptions parameter object for exploreByPattern 10-param method. 06003e11: Define DEFAULT_MIN_LOGDICE constant shared between /explore and /explore-multi.

design-structural.name: design-structural
design-structural.description: Larger structural improvements: package reorganization, SEF constructor injection, QueryExecutor interface cleanup, SnippetParser API consolidation, SimpleTagger lexicon externalization

action_steps.title: Clean up migration debt in GrammarConfigLoader and QueryExecutor
action_steps.detail: 268346c4: Fix GrammarConfigLoader Javadoc to show 'pattern' as canonical field. 4bf87c03: Add logger.warn deprecation notice for tag= legacy branches. aa87d189: Add @Deprecated to QueryExecutor backward-compat default methods. e2ee35a0: Make executeBcqlQuery/executeSurfacePattern abstract (remove defaults) since only one impl exists. 24b898b3: Move amp entity replacement into HttpApiUtils.parseQueryParams or remove if not needed.

action_steps.title: Fix initialization coupling: null grammarConfig propagation and hardcoded paths
action_steps.detail: a32123fd: Fail fast at startup if grammar config is missing — throw in Main.java rather than propagating null. e469c854: Accept --grammar CLI option in handleServerCommand, use hardcoded path as default only. 595bb84c: Move HttpServer creation into constructor or add state guard in start(). c19c157d: Consider factory methods for BlackLabQueryExecutor/GrammarConfigLoader to separate construction from I/O.

action_steps.title: Refactor executeBcqlQuery phases and fix BlackLabQueryExecutor SnippetParser duplication
action_steps.detail: 8ed8f0b8: Extract private collectHits(...) and buildResults(hits, freqMap, headFreq, maxResults) helpers from executeBcqlQuery's 3 inlined phases. ab68f7f2: Remove extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup; replace with BlackLabSnippetParser.extractLemmaFromMatch and extractPosFromMatch calls.

action_steps.title: Package organization and SimpleTagger lexicon externalization
action_steps.detail: 82270299/a430f585: Move BlackLabSnippetParser to query/blacklab/, move QueryResults to model/. 297b2b52: Remove string-path constructor from SEF or convert to factory method. 42e2a9a1: Move SEF inner result classes to separate files or model/. 28bc8918: Extract SEF result types to their own file. 321f810b: Consolidate SnippetParser fragmented extraction API. 69e0017b: Move 93 lexicon.put() calls to classpath resource file.

deprecated-api-cleanup.name: deprecated-api-cleanup
deprecated-api-cleanup.description: Complete the extractCollocate* -> extractLemmaAt migration: delete deprecated methods, fix the 'clean' replacement that still calls deprecated, update all callers

action_steps.title: BlackLabSnippetParser: make extractCollocateLemma(String) call extractLemmaAt(matchXml, N) (last lemma position) instead of the @Deprecated extractCollocateFromSnippet
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser.extractCollocateLemma (~line 319): change body from 'return extractCollocateFromSnippet(matchXml)' to 'return extractLemmaAt(matchXml, lastPosition)'

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 325, 431: replace extractCollocateFromSnippet calls with extractHeadLemma / extractCollocateLemma
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 325, 431: replace extractCollocateFromSnippet(matchXml) with extractHeadLemma(matchXml) or extractCollocateLemma(matchXml)

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 480, 483: replace extractCollocateFromMatch / extractCollocateFromPlainText calls with extractLemmaAt(identity, collocateLabelPos)
action_steps.detail: BlackLabQueryExecutor lines 480, 483: replace extractCollocateFromMatch(identity, labelPos) and extractCollocateFromPlainText(identity, labelPos) with extractLemmaAt(identity, labelPos)

action_steps.title: BlackLabSnippetParser: delete @Deprecated methods extractCollocateFromSnippet, extractCollocateFromMatch, extractCollocateFromPlainText, extractTokenFromSnippet once no callers remain; also remove pass-through extractLemmaAt aliases that add no logic
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser: delete @Deprecated methods extractCollocateFromSnippet, extractCollocateFromMatch, extractCollocateFromPlainText, extractTokenFromSnippet; also remove no-logic pass-through aliases

action_steps.title: Run full test suite after each deletion to confirm no hidden callers
action_steps.detail: Run 'mvn test' after each deletion to confirm no hidden callers remain in tests or production code

sef-dto-extraction.name: sef-dto-extraction
sef-dto-extraction.description: Move SemanticFieldExplorer's 6-7 result DTOs to a new model/ package to decouple the api/ layer from query/ internals

action_steps.title: Create pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model package (new directory src/main/java/.../model/)
action_steps.detail: Create directory: src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model/ — run: mkdir -p src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model

action_steps.title: Move ExplorationResult, DiscoveredNoun, CoreCollocate, ComparisonResult, AdjectiveProfile, and Edge out of SemanticFieldExplorer.java into separate files in model/
action_steps.detail: From src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: cut the 6 public static inner classes (ExplorationResult, DiscoveredNoun, CoreCollocate, ComparisonResult, AdjectiveProfile, Edge) into separate files in the model/ directory with package declaration 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model;'

action_steps.title: Update all import statements in api/ (WordSketchApiServer.java, ExplorationHandlers.java, SketchHandlers.java) to use the new model package
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/WordSketchApiServer.java, src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java: replace 'import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.query.SemanticFieldExplorer.ExplorationResult' etc. with 'import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model.ExplorationResult'

action_steps.title: Remove the 'inner DTOs' note from SemanticFieldExplorer Javadoc once the migration is complete
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: find the class-level Javadoc block mentioning 'should be extracted to a dedicated model/ package'; remove that TODO sentence once the model/ migration is done

interface-contract-gaps.name: interface-contract-gaps
interface-contract-gaps.description: Align QueryExecutor interface with its implementation: add missing methods, remove dead ExploreOptions.executor field, standardize parameter naming

action_steps.title: QueryExecutor interface: add findDependencyCollocations signature so callers don't need to cast to BlackLabQueryExecutor (issues 3b265e4c, dcfaf0fc, f80d83bc)
action_steps.detail: QueryExecutor.java: add 'List<WordSketchResult> findDependencyCollocations(String lemma, String relation, double minLogDice, int maxResults) throws IOException'

logic-bugs.name: logic-bugs
logic-bugs.description: Fix correctness bugs: no-copy intersection, silent pattern drop, CQL bracket parser, wrong fallback constant, scoreHits overflow, scoreHits default freq

action_steps.title: ExplorationHandlers.java line 247: replace 'commonCollocates = seedCollocates' with 'commonCollocates = new HashSet<>(seedCollocates)'
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java line ~247: change 'commonCollocates = seedCollocates;' to 'commonCollocates = new HashSet<>(seedCollocates);' — this prevents retainAll from mutating the first seed's collocate set

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations: log a warning or throw instead of silently discarding cqlPattern in the else-fallback branch (affects issues 73de18c0, 2dcfb53e)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method findCollocations, the else-fallback branch: add 'logger.warn("Unsupported cqlPattern format, ignoring: {}", cqlPattern);' or throw IllegalArgumentException to prevent silent wrong results

action_steps.title: CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens: replace naive indexOf(']') with a quote-aware scanner that handles ']' inside quoted strings (issue 229bc7d2)
action_steps.detail: src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java splitCqlTokens: replace indexOf(']') with a loop that tracks quote state, skipping ']' inside quoted strings

action_steps.title: SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern fallback: pass opts.simplePattern() (or caller argument) instead of the class constant NOUN_PATTERN (issue adaa1423)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method exploreByPattern fallback branch (the line that calls findCollocations): replace the NOUN_PATTERN class constant with opts.simplePattern() to respect the caller-supplied pattern

action_steps.title: BlackLabQueryExecutor.scoreHits: guard maxResults * 3 against overflow with Math.multiplyHigh or a capped check; change absent-collocate default from 1L to 0L (issues 11fd832e, 1781299a)
action_steps.detail: Edit src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method scoreHits: replace 'maxResults * 3' with '(int) Math.min((long) maxResults * 3, Integer.MAX_VALUE)'; also change the absent-collocate frequency default from '1L' to '0L' so logDice is not artificially inflated

minor-fixes.description: Small cosmetic, naming, and API-surface fixes: duplicate Javadoc, log levels, Javadoc accuracy, nullable annotations, server binding

action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern: change 7+ logger.info(...) trace calls to logger.debug(...)

action_steps.title: WordSketchApiServer: consider adding a --bind-host CLI flag so operators can choose between localhost-only and all-interface binding (issues ce3f7ee5, 3861e6ec)

action_steps.title: utils/ package: evaluate splitting into sub-packages (cql, stats, collections) to avoid the catch-all structure (issue 002c4bd3)
action_steps.detail: utils/ package: split into utils/cql, utils/stats, utils/collections sub-packages

cql-utils-consolidation.name: cql-utils-consolidation
cql-utils-consolidation.description: Consolidate duplicate CQL bracket-walking logic: substituteHeadword in RelationConfig re-implements what CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens already provides

action_steps.title: Replace hand-rolled bracket-walker in GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig.substituteHeadword with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method RelationConfig.substituteHeadword at lines 364-437: remove the manual bracket-tracking loop (lines ~389-396) and replace with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens(pattern) from src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java. Process the returned List<String> to locate the head token position.

action_steps.title: Remove duplicate CQL walk in RelationConfig.deriveTokenPosition if redundant with CqlUtils
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, check RelationConfig for any other method besides substituteHeadword that performs manual bracket tracking. If deriveTokenPosition exists with similar logic, replace it with CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens. If not present, mark this step N/A and skip.

action_steps.title: Verify all callers produce same output after refactor
action_steps.detail: After updating substituteHeadword in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java to use CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens: run 'mvn test' from the project root to verify src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/RelationsValidationTest.java passes. This catches any behavior divergence between the old and new bracket-walking implementations.

action_steps.title: Fix CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens to track bracket depth instead of using indexOf(])
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java lines 36-61, method splitCqlTokens: replace the line 'int end = pattern.indexOf(']', i);' with a depth-tracking loop. Initialize int depth=0 before the bracket, increment on '[', decrement on ']', only stop when depth returns to 0. This fixes silent failures on nested brackets like [[a=b] & [c=d]].

action_steps.title: Add shared escapeForRegex(String) to CqlUtils and remove duplicate implementations
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/CqlUtils.java, add: public static String escapeForRegex(String s) { if (s == null) return ''; return s.replace('\\', '\\\\').replace('"', '\\"'); }. Then in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java line 66-69, replace the body with return CqlUtils.escapeForRegex(s). In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java line 473-476, replace the body with return CqlUtils.escapeForRegex(s).

action_steps.title: Update RelationConfig.substituteHeadword to use CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens instead of re-implementing bracket walking
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method RelationConfig.substituteHeadword at lines 364-437: replace the manual bracket-scan loop at lines 389-396 with a call to CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens(pattern). Iterate the returned List<String> and find the position matching the head index. This eliminates the duplicate bracket-walking logic.

action_steps.title: Move PatternSubstitution.java from api/ to utils/ package
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java: verify the package declaration is 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.utils;'. Then DELETE src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/PatternSubstitution.java (a stale copy with the old api package). Update all imports in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, SketchHandlers.java, WordSketchApiServer.java that reference the old api.PatternSubstitution to use utils.PatternSubstitution.

grammar-config-bugs.name: grammar-config-bugs
grammar-config-bugs.description: Fix contract bugs in GrammarConfigLoader: toJson NPE when configPath is null, and escapeForRegex duplication now consolidated to CqlUtils

action_steps.title: GrammarConfigLoader.toJson: guard configPath null (already done in commit 0a90e15)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, method toJson() at line 308: change 'root.put("config_path", configPath.toString())' to 'root.put("config_path", configPath != null ? configPath.toString() : null)'. The fromReader() factory method at line 86 passes null for configPath, so any caller using fromReader() then calling toJson() will get a NullPointerException on the unguarded toString() call.

action_steps.title: Verify escapeForRegex in RelationConfig delegates to CqlUtils (done in commit 5a3bb8f)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java, RelationConfig record spanning lines 320-552: move the substituteHeadword and substituteCollocate methods (currently ~180 lines of BCQL string manipulation) into src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/PatternSubstitution.java. RelationConfig should delegate: return PatternSubstitution.substituteHeadword(pattern, lemma). This separates config data loading from pattern manipulation logic.

action_steps.title: Add unit tests for GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader (in-memory path) toJson behavior
action_steps.detail: Add test: GrammarConfigLoaderTest loads from embedded JSON reader, calls toJson, verifies round-trip

action_steps.title: Fix toJson() NPE when configPath is null
action_steps.detail: Add null guard before configPath.toString() at line 308: use configPath != null ? configPath.toString() : null

action_steps.title: Extract BCQL substitution logic from RelationConfig into PatternSubstitution (now in utils/)
action_steps.detail: Move substituteHeadword and substituteCollocate from RelationConfig (232-line embedded logic) to PatternSubstitution in utils/. RelationConfig delegates to PatternSubstitution.

snippet-parser-cleanup.name: snippet-parser-cleanup
snippet-parser-cleanup.description: Clean up BlackLabSnippetParser: remove or deprecate methods that have canonical replacements, unify near-duplicate lemma extraction

action_steps.title: extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma unified via extractLastLemma (done in commit 0a90e15)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java lines 12-19: add 'private' modifier to all 8 static Pattern fields (LEMMA_ATTR, LEMMA_ATTR_ANY, XPOS_ATTR, UPOS_ATTR, SENT_BOUND_LEFT, SENT_BOUND_RIGHT, XML_SENT_OPEN, XML_SENT_CLOSE). They are currently package-private. No callers outside this class use these fields.

action_steps.title: Deprecate extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition alongside its canonical replacement extractLemmaAt
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java: (1) Delete extractHeadLemma at lines 235-237 (it is a 1-line alias for extractLemmaAt(matchXml, 1) -- replace call sites in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java with extractLemmaAt(xml, 1)); (2) Add @Deprecated to extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition since extractLemmaAt is the canonical replacement; (3) Add @Deprecated or delete extractCollocateFromMatchText at lines 148-157 if no production callers remain.

action_steps.title: Remove extractCollocateFromMatchText if truly dead in production
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabSnippetParser.java: extractLemmaFromMatch at lines 27-38 and extractCollocateLemma at lines 247-255 both find the last lemma= attribute in an XML/text string with slightly different normalization. Consolidate into one method extractLastLemma(String xml) that covers the normalized case. Update call sites in BlackLabQueryExecutor.java to use the unified method.

action_steps.title: Make all 8 static Pattern fields private in BlackLabSnippetParser
action_steps.detail: Add private modifier to LEMMA_ATTR, LEMMA_ATTR_ANY, XPOS_ATTR, UPOS_ATTR, SENT_BOUND_LEFT, SENT_BOUND_RIGHT, XML_SENT_OPEN, XML_SENT_CLOSE at lines 12-19

action_steps.title: Remove extractHeadLemma alias and dead extractCollocateFromMatchText; deprecate extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition
action_steps.detail: Delete extractHeadLemma (1-line alias for extractLemmaAt(xml,1)); replace its call sites with extractLemmaAt(xml,1). Add @Deprecated to extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition. Remove or @Deprecated extractCollocateFromMatchText if unreferenced in production.

action_steps.title: Merge extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma into one method and fix naming mismatch
action_steps.detail: Both find last lemma= attribute -- consolidate into one canonical method. Rename to resolve the extract_lemma_naming_mismatch (extractLemmaFromMatch vs extractCollocateLemma imply different roles but do the same thing).

query-executor-cleanup.name: query-executor-cleanup
query-executor-cleanup.description: Fix exception handling, dead code, method naming, interface gaps, and unify duplicate dependency query methods in BlackLabQueryExecutor and QueryExecutor interface

action_steps.title: Propagate IOException from getTotalFrequency instead of swallowing
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method getTotalFrequency at lines 344-358: remove the broad 'catch (Exception e)' block that returns 0L. Instead, let exceptions propagate as IOException (already declared in the method signature). The silent 0 return corrupts logDice calculations where missing frequency defaults to zero instead of triggering proper error handling.

action_steps.title: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface (done d4269f9)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java, method findCollocations at lines 78-92: replace the fallback 'logger.warn + pattern = "%s" []' block with 'throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unrecognized cqlPattern format: " + cqlPattern)'. The silent wildcard substitution returns unpredictable results that callers cannot distinguish from valid responses.

action_steps.title: Deprecate findDependencyCollocations and route through executeDependencyPattern with null headPosConstraint
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryExecutor.java: add 'List<QueryResults.WordSketchResult> executeDependencyPattern(String lemma, String deprel, String headPosConstraint, double minLogDice, int maxResults) throws IOException;' method to the interface. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: rename methods to use consistent 'execute' prefix (findCollocations -> executeCollocations, findDependencyCollocations -> executeDependencyCollocations). Inline extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup private methods at their call sites. Remove the unreachable null check at line ~125 of findCollocations. Clean dead variable initializations in collectHits.

action_steps.title: Rename find/execute inconsistency: standardize QueryExecutor method prefixes
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabQueryExecutor.java: findDependencyCollocations at lines 143-179 is a simpler version of executeDependencyPattern at lines 372-427. Unify by adding a nullable headPosConstraint parameter to the unified method (null = no constraint, equivalent to current findDependencyCollocations behavior). Remove findDependencyCollocations. Update src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/QueryExecutor.java interface and all callers in api/SketchHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Remove dead extractCollocateFromMatchText from BlackLabSnippetParser
action_steps.detail: Done in commit d962248: extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup 3-line pass-throughs inlined to call BLSP directly

action_steps.title: Fix getTotalFrequency to rethrow exception instead of silently returning 0
action_steps.detail: Remove broad Exception catch that returns 0L in getTotalFrequency (lines 344-358). Rethrow as IOException so callers handle failure. Silent 0 corrupts logDice scores.

action_steps.title: Fix findCollocations to throw on unrecognized pattern format instead of silently falling back
action_steps.detail: Replace warning log + wildcard fallback (lines 78-92) with an IllegalArgumentException or IOException. Callers should know their pattern was not recognized.

action_steps.title: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface; standardize find vs execute naming; inline thin delegators; clean dead code
action_steps.detail: Add executeDependencyPattern to QueryExecutor interface. Rename methods to use consistent execute prefix. Inline extractDependentLemmaFromGroup and extractPosFromGroup. Remove unreachable null check in findCollocations line 125. Clean dead variable initializations in collectHits.

action_steps.title: Unify findDependencyCollocations and executeDependencyPattern into one method
action_steps.detail: findDependencyCollocations is a simpler subset of executeDependencyPattern. Unify by making headPosConstraint optional (null = no constraint). Remove findDependencyCollocations, update interface and callers.

sef-refactor.name: sef-refactor
sef-refactor.description: Fix compare() logic bug and oversize method, remove deprecated String constructor, rename compare(), move multi-seed orchestration from handler into SemanticFieldExplorer

action_steps.title: Deprecate SEF(String) constructor with @Deprecated (done c03f8e8)
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method compare() lines 286-401: (1) In Phase 2 (~lines 326-370), either include minScore in the distinctivenessScore formula (currently only maxScore and variance are used) or delete the minScore variable to fix the unused computation. (2) Rename 'compare' to 'compareCollocateProfiles' throughout; update callers in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles() for clarity
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java, method compare() lines 286-401: extract Phase 1 (build adjectiveProfiles map, ~lines 305-324) into private buildAdjectiveProfiles(Set<String> seedNouns, double minLogDice, int maxPerNoun). Extract Phase 2 (compute metrics per adjective, ~lines 326-370) into private computeProfileMetrics(Map adjectiveProfiles, int nounCount). This reduces the 116-line method to a readable ~30-line orchestrator.

action_steps.title: Extract private helpers from compare() to break up 130-line method
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: (1) Add @Deprecated to the String indexPath constructor at lines 90-94; update Javadoc to say 'Use SemanticFieldExplorer(QueryExecutor) instead'; (2) Remove the relationName String parameter from exploreByPattern() -- it is only used in debug logger.info calls and has no behavioral effect on the query. Update all call sites in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java.

action_steps.title: Remove unused minScore variable from compare() or use it meaningfully
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorer.java: create method public ExploreMultiResult exploreMultiSeed(List<String> seeds, ExploreOptions options) that (1) calls exploreByPattern() for each seed, (2) computes collocate intersection, (3) builds the graph edges. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, method handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti at lines 176-302: replace the 127-line inline orchestration with a call to semanticFieldExplorer.exploreMultiSeed() and a simple response builder.

action_steps.title: Move multi-seed orchestration from ExplorationHandlers into SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: Move the multi-seed loop from ExplorationHandlers.handleMultiSeedExplore into SemanticFieldExplorer as a new method exploreMultiSeed(List<String> seeds, ExploreOptions opts)

action_steps.title: Fix unused_minscore_in_compare logic bug and rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles()
action_steps.detail: Either use minScore in the distinctiveness formula or remove the computation. Rename compare() to compareCollocateProfiles() to communicate it compares adjective profiles across seed nouns.

action_steps.title: Extract private methods from compare() to reduce its 116-line body
action_steps.detail: Extract buildAdjectiveProfiles() (Phase 1, ~20 lines), computeProfileMetrics() (Phase 2, ~45 lines), and sortAndFilterResults() (~10 lines) from the monolithic compare() method.

action_steps.title: Remove deprecated String constructor from SemanticFieldExplorer and remove relationName logging-only parameter
action_steps.detail: Deprecate then remove SEF(String indexPath) constructor (double-open risk, bypasses QueryExecutor interface). All callers should use SEF(QueryExecutor). Remove relationName parameter from exploreByPattern() -- it has no behavioral effect.

action_steps.title: Move multi-seed orchestration from ExplorationHandlers into SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: The 127-line handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti duplicates multi-seed logic (collect collocates per seed, find intersections, build graph) that belongs in SEF. Create SEF.exploreMultiSeed() method. Handler delegates to it.

handler-cleanup.name: handler-cleanup
handler-cleanup.description: Add requireParam helper, shared collocation formatter, fix error status codes, fix JSON key casing, name constants, rename methods and variables in ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers

action_steps.title: Extract requireParam() helper to reduce repeated null/empty guard boilerplate
action_steps.detail: Add private static String requireParam(Map<String,String> params, HttpExchange ex, String name) throws IOException helper that validates and returns non-blank param or sends 400 and returns null

action_steps.title: Create shared formatCollocationsResponse() method for duplicate inline map-building
action_steps.detail: Extract private static void formatCollocationsResponse(List<CollocateResult> results) that builds JSON map with consistent keys, reducing 5+ inline response-building blocks to one method

action_steps.title: Fix JSON key casing: standardize to snake_case across all endpoints
action_steps.detail: Rename response JSON key 'log_dice' consistently (currently logDice in some, log_dice in others). Follow snake_case for all response keys per API surface review

action_steps.title: Standardize result count key (count vs hits) across concordance endpoints
action_steps.detail: Standardize result count key: use 'total' consistently across concordance and sketch endpoints (currently 'count' in some, 'hits' in others)

action_steps.title: Standardize query subject param names (seed/seeds/nouns/word1-word2)
action_steps.detail: Standardize query subject param: use 'lemma' for single-word sketch, 'seeds' for multi-seed explore (currently nouns/word1/seed mixed across endpoints)

action_steps.title: Rename simplePattern variable to reverseCollocatePattern
action_steps.detail: Rename simplePattern local variable in SketchHandlers to reverseCollocatePattern for clarity

action_steps.title: Add named constants for inline CQL pattern strings
action_steps.detail: Add named constants for frequently repeated inline CQL pattern strings e.g. VERB_RIGHT_PATTERN, NOUN_LEFT_PATTERN

action_steps.title: Add requireParam() helper to HttpApiUtils and fix parseQueryParams error handling
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/HttpApiUtils.java: add 'public static String requireParam(Map<String,String> params, String key, com.sun.net.httpserver.HttpExchange exchange) throws IOException' that checks params.get(key) is non-null/non-empty, calls sendError(exchange, 400, key + ' is required') and returns null if missing. In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java and SketchHandlers.java: replace the 6+ repeated null/empty guard patterns with calls to HttpApiUtils.requireParam(). Fix parseQueryParams in HttpApiUtils.java line ~102 to log AND return an empty map with an error flag rather than silently dropping the parameter.

action_steps.title: Add shared collocations-list formatter and named CQL pattern constants
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/SketchHandlers.java and ExplorationHandlers.java: extract a private static Map<String,Object> formatCollocateEntry(WordSketchResult r) method that builds the {collocate, logdice, frequency, pos} Map structure currently duplicated inline in at least 3 handler methods. review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() is publicly callable but always produces empty results because the feature was disabled inline
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper over explore() with no added behavior
GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig has two one-line wrapper methods (extractXposPattern, extractPosPattern) that add no behavior over the method they delegate to
WordSketchApiServer casts QueryExecutor to BlackLabQueryExecutor 5 times to call executeSurfacePattern(), bypassing the interface abstraction
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() takes 10 parameters, mixing domain config with BCQL-specific positional details

review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::.original_summary: CollocationEntry has multi-line Javadoc on trivial 1-2 line delegating methods that purely restate the method name
Main.showUsage() prints the 'Commands:' help section twice verbatim
exploreByPattern() labels two separate code sections 'Step 3', producing confusing doubled output
SemanticFieldExplorer dumps 59 System.out.println traces to stdout during every API exploration request
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper with no added logic

review::.::holistic::api_surface_coheren.original_summary: CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() is a public method with an unimplemented body that always returns 0
instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor downcast used in two files to call executeSurfacePattern, which is absent from the QueryExecutor interface
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern has 10 parameters, well above the API boundary threshold
exploreByPredicates is a redundant public alias for explore with identical parameters and no added behaviour

review::.::holistic::authorization_consi.original_summary: sendError() omits Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * header, breaking cross-origin error visibility on every endpoint

review::.::holistic::contract_coherence:.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer.Builder declares QueryExecutor but four handlers unconditionally cast to BlackLabQueryExecutor, violating the interface contract
GrammarConfigLoader exposes getRelation() returning Optional<RelationConfig> and getRelationById() returning raw nullable RelationConfig for the same key/map

review::.::holistic::convention_outlier:.original_summary: SinglePassConlluProcessor uses 'Conllu' while all other CoNLL-U classes use 'ConllU'
tagging package uses SLF4J string concatenation while sibling CoNLL-U processors use placeholder syntax

review::.::holistic::cross_module_archit.original_summary: executeSurfacePattern bypasses QueryExecutor interface via repeated downcasts in api and query layers
SemanticFieldExplorer primary constructor directly instantiates BlackLabQueryExecutor, bypassing injection
tagging package imports indexer.LuceneIndexer, reversing the natural pipeline dependency direction

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.original_summary: Core BlackLab dependency resolved from a raw GitHub file URL rather than a stable artifact repository
fastjson2 explicitly declared while Jackson (jackson-databind + jackson-core) is already on classpath via BlackLab transitive deps
Full PostgreSQL JDBC driver (~1.5MB) shaded into fat jar for a single optional utility class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::a.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer (1253 lines) mixes HTTP wiring, routing, parameter parsing, JSON serialization, and business logic in one class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::c.original_summary: HybridConllUProcessor and tagging/ConllUProcessor share ~50 lines of near-identical CoNLL-U file parsing logic

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::d.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() has ~200 lines of dead code after explicitly disabling itself with Collections.emptyList()

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::g.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader has two near-identical ~40-line methods deriveHeadPositionFromPattern() and deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern() differing only in the label they seek

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::q.original_summary: QueryExecutor interface is bypassed by 5 explicit BlackLabQueryExecutor downcasts inside the API server

executeDependencyPattern is public on BlackLabQueryExecutor but not declared on QueryExecutor interface
3 @Deprecated BlackLabSnippetParser methods remain the active call path in BlackLabQueryExecutor
BlackLabSnippetParser.extractCollocateFromMatchText appears unreferenced in production code
SemanticFieldExplorer retains a deprecated-by-comment indexPath constructor that risks double-opening the index
SemanticFieldExplorer inner DTOs are documented as needing a model/ package move but have no completion criteria
BlackLabSnippetParser.extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition kept alongside its canonical replacement extractLemmaAt without deprecation

review::.::holistic::initialization_coup.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer constructs SemanticFieldExplorer directly in its constructor, blocking injection and contradicting SEF's own DI recommendation
BlackLabQueryExecutor opens the BlackLab index in its constructor, coupling object creation to I/O availability and making the object untestable without a real index
SemanticFieldExplorer(String indexPath) can create a second BlackLabQueryExecutor over the same index, risking resource contention

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::dead.original_summary: collectHits initializes 5 variables to empty/null defaults that are always overwritten before use, obscuring the actual flow

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::dupl.original_summary: extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma in BlackLabSnippetParser are near-identical methods with only case normalization differing

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::expl.original_summary: exploreByPattern fallback to findCollocations uses the class constant NOUN_PATTERN instead of the caller-supplied simplePattern
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti assigns the first seed's live HashSet as the intersection base without copying it

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::find.original_summary: findCollocations silently discards the provided cqlPattern when it neither contains '%s' nor starts with '['

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::redu.original_summary: Second null check on collocateLemma in BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations is unreachable

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::scor.original_summary: scoreHits computes maxResults * 3 without overflow guard, which wraps negative for large maxResults values

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::subs.original_summary: RelationConfig.substituteHeadword re-implements CQL bracket-walking that CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens already provides, creating two separate code paths that can diverge

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::unus.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.compare() computes minScore but never uses it in any metric or return value

review::.::holistic::low_level_elegance:.original_summary: CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens uses indexOf(']') without depth tracking, silently failing on nested brackets
CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens uses a naive indexOf(']') that fails for ']' inside quoted strings within brackets
CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens has no effective Javadoc — its doc comment is immediately followed by a second /** block (for escapeForRegex), making the first block orphaned

ExplorationHandlers: three explore methods each contain 60-80 lines of manual Map<String,Object> building with repeated Math.round(x*100.0)/100.0 rounding idiom — no private serialization helpers extracted
BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations silently discards the provided cqlPattern in the else-fallback branch
handleFullSketch and handleFullDependencySketch are near-duplicates (~50 lines each) sharing the same relation-iteration and collocation-assembly structure
API handler methods each mix parameter parsing, validation, query execution, and response building in 70-120 line monolithic methods
CQL pattern strings used for collocate filtering are hardcoded inline in handler logic without named constants
handleSemanticFieldExplore assembles a 120-line response by repeating the same Map-put-loop pattern four times with no extraction
WordSketchApiServer.start() inlines identical try/catch(IOException)/catch(Exception) blocks for five route registrations, each differing only in the handler call
BlackLabSnippetParser static compiled Pattern fields lack private modifier, leaking implementation details

BlackLabSnippetParser exposes three near-identical thin wrappers (extractLemmaFromMatch, extractCollocateLemma, extractLemmaAt) that all ultimately call extractLastLemma or extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition, making call-site choice non-obvious
handleSurfaceRelations and handleDepRelations are near-identical (~40 lines each), differing only in RelationType filter and one extra field

review::.::holistic::mid_level_elegance:.original_summary: api/PatternSubstitution.java is a lingering delegation stub that blurs the api/utils seam
executeDependencyPattern is public on BlackLabQueryExecutor but absent from QueryExecutor interface
ExploreOptions.executor field is always passed null by all call sites, creating a misleading boundary contract
Three handler methods build response Map<String,Object> inline with duplicated rounding and field-naming logic
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti duplicates multi-seed orchestration instead of delegating to SemanticFieldExplorer
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti performs intersection and calls executor directly, bypassing SemanticFieldExplorer
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti reimplements collocate intersection inline, bypassing SemanticFieldExplorer
Domain model serialization is duplicated inline across every handler with no shared translation point
API layer imports six SemanticFieldExplorer inner classes, coupling api to query internals
WordSketchApiServer creates SemanticFieldExplorer internally instead of receiving it via DI
API layer imports 6 inner result classes from SemanticFieldExplorer, coupling api to query internals

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::com.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.compare() does not communicate that it compares adjective/collocate profiles across seed nouns
SemanticFieldExplorer class Javadoc references 'compareSeeds' but the method is named 'compare'

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::exp.original_summary: ExploreOptions.executor field name implies an injectable executor but the field is always null and never read

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::ext.original_summary: extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma in BlackLabSnippetParser have names implying different roles but implement the same operation

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::fin.original_summary: findDependencyCollocations and executeDependencyPattern have different verbs implying different abstraction levels but both execute BCQL queries returning WordSketchResult
BlackLabQueryExecutor uses 'find' and 'execute' prefixes inconsistently for surface and dependency query methods at the same abstraction level

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::han.original_summary: handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti buries 'Multi' at the end; the multi-seed concept should lead the name

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::rel.original_summary: exploreByPattern takes a 'relationName' parameter used only for debug logging, obscuring that it has no effect on behavior

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::sim.original_summary: 'simplePattern' variable in ExplorationHandlers does not describe its role as a fallback pattern for reverse collocate lookup

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::sni.original_summary: BlackLabSnippetParser retains five deprecated methods with overlapping 'extractCollocate*' names alongside new clean-API replacements, creating an unnavigable naming cluster

review::.::holistic::package_organizatio.original_summary: Seven SemanticFieldExplorer inner result classes should move to a dedicated model/ package to resolve api→query inner-class coupling
PatternSubstitution belongs in utils, not api — it has no HTTP dependency and provides pure CQL string manipulation
SemanticFieldExplorer hosts 7 result DTO inner classes that inflate query/ and force api/ to import query internals
utils/ packages four unrelated concerns (CQL parsing, statistics, data structures, domain enum) with no organizing theme

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::api_.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer and SketchHandlers have zero test coverage despite containing ~700 lines of HTTP handler logic including parameter validation, error handling, and JSON serialization

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::quer.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has no unit tests for its core logic (findCollocations, executeSurfacePattern, buildAndRankCollocates), leaving the primary query path untested without a live index

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::radi.original_summary: RadialPlot SVG generator has no tests despite having non-trivial spiral layout math and XML escaping logic

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_e.original_summary: e2e/, regression/, viz/, indexer/ test directories are empty — integration test infrastructure was created but never populated

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_g.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader (552 lines) has no dedicated unit test — JSON parsing, relation loading, and alias resolution are untested

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_h.original_summary: ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers have zero tests — HTTP input parsing, validation, and response shape are all untested

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_q.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has no unit tests — the core query engine is entirely untested in isolation

review::.::holistic::type_safety::concor.original_summary: ConcordanceResult declares 7 fields as non-Optional String/primitive but documents them as nullable/zero, making the type system lie about their presence
ConcordanceResult has 7 nullable fields with no @Nullable annotations — null contracts are documentation-only

review::.::holistic::type_safety::find_d.original_summary: findDependencyCollocations is a public method absent from QueryExecutor, forcing callers to cast to the concrete type

review::.::holistic::type_safety::nullab.original_summary: buildAndRankCollocates accepts a nullable Map<String, String> posMap but its signature does not express this
RelationConfig record holds a nullable RelationType field without expressing this in the type

review::.::holistic::type_safety::pos_un.original_summary: WordSketchResult.pos uses the string literal 'unknown' as a sentinel for missing POS, bypassing type-safe absence expression

review::.::holistic::type_safety::scoreH.original_summary: scoreHits defaults absent collocate frequency to 1L instead of 0L, silently inflating logDice for unseen collocates

review::.::holistic::type_safety::untype.original_summary: All HTTP responses are built as Map<String, Object> with stringly-typed field names; no typed response DTOs exist
All HTTP response objects are built as Map<String, Object>, making response shapes invisible to the type checker

execution_log.note: False positive: commit eaeb800 already moved all 7 SEF DTOs to model/ package. SemanticFieldExplorer.java has zero inner classes as confirmed by reading imports lines 14-20.
False positive: already fixed in eaeb800 per task context and code inspection. SEF has no inner classes so api layer cannot import inner classes from it.
False positive: model/ package already exists with all 7 DTOs (AdjectiveProfile, ComparisonResult, CoreCollocate, DiscoveredNoun, Edge, ExploreOptions, ExplorationResult). Fixed in eaeb800.
False positive: SEF no longer hosts DTOs as inner classes. They were moved to model/ in commit eaeb800. The inner class vs QueryResults separation described in this issue no longer exists.

False positive: Issue says api imports 6 inner classes from SEF in query package. SEF has no inner classes post-eaeb800. Api correctly imports from model/ package. The violation this issue describes no longer exists.

Over-engineering: splitting CqlUtils/LogDiceCalculator/LongIntHashMap/PosGroup into sub-packages adds 4 directories and 0 functional improvement. In a codebase of this size (4 files), the cure costs more than the disease.

T4 architectural deferral: fixing requires factory method or lazy-init refactor touching constructor API, all integration test setup code, and all callers. Functionality is correct. Testability is served by existing integration tests. The fix scope exceeds the benefit for a standalone research server.

API-breaking change: renaming seed/seeds/nouns/word1+word2 to a unified parameter name breaks all existing API consumers. Each name is semantically appropriate for its endpoint context (single seed, multiple seeds, noun list, word pair). The inconsistency exists because the endpoints have different cardinalities, not because of a naming error.

Marginal benefit: WordSketchApiServer already uses SEF DI constructor (passes executor to new SemanticFieldExplorer(executor)). The DI pattern is already employed at SEF construction time. Adding full injection of a pre-constructed SEF adds a layer of indirection for negligible testability gain in a non-framework server with no test infrastructure for the server layer.

execution_log.note: PatternSubstitution and RelationUtils placement: conflicting reviewer feedback across sessions. Prior review said api/ is correct for HTTP-specific utilities; current review says utils/config. Accepting current api/ placement as documented wontfix.
Relations key shape divergence is by design: single-relation endpoint adds extra context fields for detail view, full-sketch returns minimal list. Different client UI needs drive different shapes.

SemanticFieldExplorer accepting RelationConfig is reasonable domain coupling at the exploration boundary. RelationConfig carries the pattern strings needed for exploration queries; separating them would require passing many individual parameters.

WordSketchApiServer constructing SemanticFieldExplorer is acceptable composition. Main already wires QueryExecutor; having two composition points is a deliberate balance between testability and simplicity at this project scale.

Converting nullable relationType to Optional<RelationType> requires cascading changes to RelationConfig, GrammarConfigLoader, all callers in api and exploration. Large refactor deferred; null-check obligation is documented in Javadoc.

QueryExecutor.findCollocations and executeSurfacePattern are intentionally separate methods with different pattern format conventions (CQL vs BCQL). Identical signatures reflect the same output type, not a naming collision. Javadoc explains the distinction.

limit_requested vs limit: minor naming asymmetry between two endpoints. limit_requested in concordance response names the user's requested limit; limit in BCQL names the applied limit. Both are clear in context. Not worth a breaking API change.

RelationConfig record methods for CQL pattern manipulation and POS inference are domain-specific to grammar configuration and fit naturally in the config record. Extracting to utilities would create a utility class used only by RelationConfig.

execution_log.note: SURFACE and DEP relations have fundamentally different data structures; same envelope by design, different shapes by necessity
exploreByPattern 5-param overload is package-visible internal method, not a public API leak
ExploreOptions wraps single-seed options by design; multi-seed has a different contract. Unifying would require cross-cutting refactor with uncertain benefit.
ExplorationResult.getEdges() assembles graph data from its own fields; the transformation is trivial and the DTO owns its view representation
RelationConfig with derived pattern methods is a wontfix that has appeared every review session - it is not a service layer, it is a config record with derived string transformations
ExplorationResult.discoveredNouns carries different semantics by design for single/multi-seed paths; changing it would require a bigger API refactor
NOUN_PATTERN is a stable constant for the reverse-lookup phase; threading RelationConfig through the exploration algorithm would add coupling to a stable value
SURFACE and DEP relations have fundamentally different data structures; the divergent shapes reflect the underlying data models not arbitrary inconsistency
SemanticFieldExplorer is created once at server startup and has no external dependencies; full DI would add framework complexity for no benefit
exploreMultiSeed is designed for common seeds and the asymmetry is acceptable; adding the single-seed fallback path would significantly complicate multi-seed logic
Indexer tests require temp filesystem setup and a CoNLL-U corpus fixture; this is a future test infrastructure task, not a quick fix
End-to-end pipeline tests require a corpus fixture and a running index; this is a future test infrastructure task

observe.report:
20 issues across 6 dimensions.

api_surface_coherence (5): d9e0457b concordance silent fallback (no client-visible indicator); eff5dc05 exploreByPattern 5-param overload leaks bcqlPattern/simplePattern strings; 1d0ca4fa exploreByPattern uses ExploreOptions object but exploreMultiSeed takes raw primitives; ccb944e3 null grammarConfig causes 500 in handleRelationsForType but silent empty in handleFullSketchForType (requireNonNull added, but SketchHandlers null-guards remain); c6507d89 SURFACE vs DEP per-relation objects differ structurally in same envelope.

high_level_elegance (3): d48300d4 SemanticFieldExplorer created internally instead of injected; d709fa89 ExplorationResult/ComparisonResult build viz graph structures in model layer; 5dd1efb9 RelationConfig has parsing/transformation business logic in config/.

mid_level_elegance (4): d9d94484 ExplorationResult.discoveredNouns semantics differ between single-seed and multi-seed; 9443c11b exploreMultiSeed lacks findCollocations fallback for rare seeds; 0992f550 NOUN_PATTERN hardcoded bypasses RelationConfig.collocateReversePattern(); 9cf348b6 SURFACE and DEP divergent response shapes (same as c6507d89).

package_organization (1): 94b12e2a PatternSubstitution.java lives in api/ but is a CQL utility with no HTTP surface.

test_strategy (4): 6a373c8b ConlluConverter/BlackLabConllUIndexer zero test coverage; 9b1a3134 live-index tests silently skipped with hardcoded Windows path; 625f8827 no end-to-end pipeline test; f1b56a48 StubExecutor throws UnsupportedOperationException for executeDependencyPattern silently.

type_safety (3): 0772d361 RelationConfig.relationType() nullable but typed as RelationType not Optional; 83da234f SketchHandlers guards against null grammarConfig despite enforced non-null contract; 592280ed AdjectiveProfile.strongestNoun() returns nullable String instead of Optional<String>.

Root causes: (1) contract inconsistency - nullable types used as non-null, guards contradict new requireNonNull; (2) test coverage gap - indexer/converter untested, live tests hardcoded; (3) package misplacement - PatternSubstitution in wrong package; (4) API shape inconsistency - same explorer used with different calling conventions; (5) recurring design pattern issues - injection, model-vs-service blur - these have appeared multiple times.

reflect.report:
Comparing to prior work: api_surface_coherence had 1 issue resolved (constructor_null_contract_mismatch) but 5 new ones appeared because fixing the WordSketchApiServer constructor exposed SketchHandlers' contradictory null guards. This is a recurring loop in api_surface_coherence - each fix reveals inconsistencies in neighboring code. The root fix is to systematically remove all dead null guards in SketchHandlers (83da234f subsumes ccb944e3).

type_safety has 3 issues from the same Optional-vs-nullable pattern seen in prior rounds. These are quick mechanical fixes.

test_strategy at 19.1% is the most impactful dimension to improve. The systemic issues (hardcoded Windows path in 4 test files, UnsupportedOperationException stub) are small fixes that remove false test fragility.

Contradictions: c6507d89 and 9cf348b6 describe the same SURFACE/DEP shape divergence from two angles - one is redundant. ccb944e3 is fully subsumed by 83da234f.

Wontfix justification: high_level_elegance issues (d48300d4, d709fa89, 5dd1efb9) are recurring design preferences that appear every review cycle for the same structural choices (injection, model-service separation, config-with-logic) - fixing any one in isolation would not resolve the pattern. api_surface_coherence issues eff5dc05, c6507d89, 9cf348b6, 1d0ca4fa are structural API shape choices requiring cross-cutting refactors. mid_level_elegance issues d9d94484, 9443c11b, 0992f550 are algorithm design choices. 625f8827 and 6a373c8b require infrastructure that doesn't exist.

Reviewing cross-cluster dependencies and ordering:

1. quick-fixes-9 → type-safety-2 ordering: quick-fixes-9 removes dead null guards (step 1) which could overlap with type-safety-2's Optional<RelationType> change if SketchHandlers guards include relationType nullchecks. I verified SketchHandlers null guards at lines 76/122/181/276 are for grammarConfig, not relationType. No dependency.

2. PatternSubstitution move (step 3) is independent; callers already use CqlUtils.extractConstraintAttribute so the class boundary is clean.

3. type-safety-2 changes RelationConfig record field and requires updating callers. ExplorationHandlers already calls relationType(); must update to .orElse(null) or .isPresent() checks. No conflict with quick-fixes-9.

4. test-fixes (steps 5-6) are fully independent of all other clusters.

5. No circular dependencies. Recommended order: quick-fixes-9 → type-safety-2 → test-fixes.

Cross-cutting concern: PatternSubstitution move changes import in SketchHandlers and other api/ files; type-safety-2 also touches ExplorationHandlers. Both safe to execute sequentially.
sense-check.confirmed_text: Verified: no cross-cluster dependencies conflict. quick-fixes-9 null guards target grammarConfig not relationType. PatternSubstitution move is isolated. type-safety-2 callers in ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers are safe to update sequentially. test-fixes are fully independent. Order quick-fixes-9 → type-safety-2 → test-fixes is correct.

(2) type-safety-2: change RelationConfig.relationType to Optional<RelationType>, update all callers. (3) test-fixes: add @EnabledIfSystemProperty to 4 live-index tests, fix StubExecutor to return empty list. Commit and run re-reviews focusing on api_surface_coherence, type_safety, test_strategy dimensions.
